title: PeacefulMobs
description: Remove mob hostility from your world
body: # PeacefulMobs ### I did not know [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-ignore-me) was a thing.. Removes mobs' player goals Prevents mobs from attacking you! Useful if you want peace (and resources) in your world If I observed correctly, the mod is functional This was made because I'm scared of mobs ;-; Enjoy!
